name: Braised Short Ribs
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Onions sliced, and separated into rings
1 cup Beer, beef broth or water; optional
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 12:00
1. Place short ribs on broiler rack or in skillet and brown to remove fat; drain well.
2. Combine 1/2 cup flour with the paprika, salt and dry mustard; toss with short ribs.
3. Place remaining ingredients except 2 tablespoons flour and the water in the crockpot.
4. Remove short ribs to warm serving platter.
5. If thickened gravy is desired, make a smooth paste of flour and water.
6. Turn Crock pot on High and stir in paste.
7. Cover and Cook until gravy is thickened.
